creator: jhein@symmetricom.com
text:
Update finance/opentaxsolver to 8.05

    * v8.05 (3/28/11) - Enhanced US-1040 AMT worksheet and comments on form 6251 lines 6-27.
    * v8.04 (3/20/11) - Added Schedule-M to US-1040. Fixed final line of NJ State form. Made GUI and tax_solver routines quote file names containing spaces.
